🚨 EMERGENCY @ MENTION SYSTEM TEST

Production validation of mention system fixes

🎯 TESTING PROTOCOL:

  1. Type @ symbol in each test area
  2. Dropdown should appear immediately with agent suggestions
  3. Check console for debug output (F12 → Console)
  4. Report status - GREEN = working, RED = broken

Expected behavior: Any @ symbol should trigger a dropdown with agent suggestions within 100ms.
